prompt:
Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: project-bound RPG world atlas map, portrait orientation
Primary request: Warhammer 40,000 / Dark Imperium inspired grimdark planetary war-zone atlas for the terrain type single_continent.
Scene/backdrop: one huge primary continent on a polluted Imperial world, surrounded by toxic oceans, hive city mega-structures, underhive slums, industrial wastelands, promethium refinery zones, ruined manufactorum belts, gothic spires, ash deserts, irradiated plains, war trenches, void-shield districts and mechanicus survey overlays.
Style/medium: high-resolution illustrated grimdark far-future atlas, imperial sector cartography fused with planetary terrain map, toxic ochre atmosphere, gothic architecture aesthetic, mechanicus technical overlay, parchment-metal interface feel.
Composition/framing: tall portrait planetary map, single continent fills most of the vertical frame with surrounding poisonous seas and offshore industrial platforms; include compass/auspex rose, severe gothic border, supply routes, hazard glyphs, hive icons and tactical sector boundaries without readable text.
Geography constraints: large world map crossing many climates and biomes; complex realistic coastline with peninsulas, bays, gulfs, straits, broken shores, curved coasts, deltas, polluted estuaries, ash cliffs and varied landforms; include hive megacity zones, rad deserts, toxic swamps, mountain fortresses, polar wastes, industrial basins and blasted battlefields.
Avoid: clean utopian sci-fi, bright heroic fantasy, simple oval continent, modern satellite image, readable labels, UI, watermark, logo, real-world map copy.
